trendOverride.reason: No trend override: quality 100/88, trend 68/100, sentiment neutral.

authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides a clear, practical framework for implementing AI automation with proper safeguards
Content is well-structured with actionable steps, specific tools, and measurable outcomes
Addresses a genuine business need: structured, auditable AI workflows with human oversight
Includes specific examples (Slack intake, CRM follow-up, support triage) that service businesses can relate to
Provides implementation checklist and troubleshooting guidance
Content aligns well with target audience (founders, operators, marketers) and their needs
Uses authoritative sources and maintains professional tone throughout
Addresses common mistakes and provides clear success metrics
recommendedFixes: Add more specific implementation details for each tool (Slack, CRM, Notion, Zapier, Make) with concrete examples
Include a visual workflow diagram to illustrate the logging and approval process
Add a case study or before/after example showing actual business impact
Provide more specific guidance on setting up the approval thresholds (e.g., confidence scores)
Include more detailed troubleshooting examples with specific error messages
Add implementation timeline breakdown (e.g., 2-4 hours split across setup, testing, deployment)
Provide specific examples of what logs should contain and how to review them
Include a section on scaling the workflow to other business processes
